compounddef.compoundname: nil::crypto3::pubkey::ext_private_key< ecdsa< CurveType, Padding, GeneratorType, DistributionType >, typename std::enable_if< std::is_same< GeneratorType, random::rfc6979< typename CurveType::scalar_field_type::value_type, typename ecdsa< CurveType, Padding, GeneratorType, DistributionType >::hash_type > >::value >::type >

memberdef.type: public_key< ecdsa< CurveType, Padding, GeneratorType, DistributionType > >

memberdef.argsstring: (const public_key< ecdsa< CurveType, Padding, GeneratorType, DistributionType > > &lhs) const
memberdef.name: operator*
memberdef.qualifiedname: nil::crypto3::pubkey::ext_private_key< ecdsa< CurveType, Padding, GeneratorType, DistributionType >, typename std::enable_if< std::is_same< GeneratorType, random::rfc6979< typename CurveType::scalar_field_type::value_type, typename ecdsa< CurveType, Padding, GeneratorType, DistributionType >::hash_type > >::value >::type >::operator*

param.type: const public_key< ecdsa< CurveType, Padding, GeneratorType, DistributionType > > &

briefdescription.para: Multiplication overload to derive public key from private key multiplication.

parameterdescription.para: public key to be multiplied by own private key data

briefdescription.para: Extended private key class with deterministic generator and operator modifications.
